2605.19140.title: Learning to Hand Off: Provably Convergent Workflow Learning under Interface Constraints
2605.19140.paper_summary: We study workflow learning in a setting where specialized agents hand off control through a shared artifact, each agent observes only a local function of that artifact and its own private state, and no centralized learner accesses joint trajectories -- the operating regime of multi-agent LLM pipelines that span organizational, vendor, or trust boundaries. We formalize this regime as an interface-constrained semi-Markov decision process (IC-SMDP), whose decision epochs occur at handoff times, and design IC-$Q$, an asynchronous decentralized $Q$-learning algorithm in which cross-agent coordination at every handoff is exactly one scalar. Our main result is a finite-sample bound for neural IC-$Q$ that decomposes into three independently controllable error sources: neural function-approximation error, interface representation gap, and a mixing-time residual, under the random option-duration discount. Establishing this bound requires lifting the approximate information state (AIS) framework from single-agent primitive-step MDPs to multi-agent SMDPs and controlling Markovian noise under random duration, neither of which has been done in prior work. To our knowledge this is the first finite-sample guarantee for neural $Q$-learning under decentralized partial observability. Four experiments: a controlled synthetic IC-SMDP that validates the bound term-by-term, multi-LLM mathematical reasoning, multi-agent routing, and multi-agent CPU programming, show that IC-$Q$ matches a centralized oracle without any agent observing joint trajectories, with each of the three error sources scaling along its corresponding axis as the bound predicts.
2605.19140.paper_summary_zh: 我們研究在一個專門代理透過共享工件交接控制的環境中的工作流程學習，每個代理僅觀察該工件的局部功能及其自身的私有狀態，且沒有集中式學習者訪問聯合軌跡——這是跨越組織、供應商或信任邊界的多代理 LLM 管道的操作模式。我們將這一模式形式化為一種接口約束的半馬爾可夫決策過程（IC-SMDP），其決策時刻發生在交接時，並設計了 IC-$Q$，這是一種異步去中心化的 $Q$-學習算法，其中每次交接時的跨代理協調正好是一個標量。我們的主要結果是對神經 IC-$Q$ 的有限樣本界限，該界限分解為三個獨立可控的誤差來源：神經函數近似誤差、接口表示差距，以及隨機選項持續折扣下的混合時間殘差。建立這一界限需要將近似信息狀態（AIS）框架從單代理原始步驟 MDP 提升到多代理 SMDP，並在隨機持續時間下控制馬爾可夫噪聲，這兩者在之前的工作中都未曾實現。據我們所知，這是首個在去中心化部分可觀察性下對神經 $Q$-學習的有限樣本保證。四個實驗：一個受控的合成 IC-SMDP 驗證了界限逐項的正確性，多 LLM 數學推理，多代理路由，以及多代理 CPU 編程，顯示 IC-$Q$ 在沒有任何代理觀察聯合軌跡的情況下匹配了一個集中式的神諭，且三個誤差來源各自在其對應的軸上隨著界限的預測而擴展。
2605.19140.author: Jiayu Li et.al.
2605.19140.authors: Jiayu Li, Enpei Zhang, Dawei Zhou, Elynn Chen, Yujun Yan
